nodes.name: Reinforced Shell
nodes.description: The attendant gains 3 maximum HP.

nodes.name: Service Cell
nodes.description: The attendant gains 1 maximum AP.

nodes.name: Fine Servos
nodes.description: Its first move each turn costs 0 AP.

nodes.name: Recovery Loop
nodes.description: It repairs 1 HP at the start of its turn.

nodes.name: Shared Telemetry
nodes.description: Agent and attendant gain 5 hit chance while within 3 tiles.

nodes.name: Reserve Charge
nodes.description: Its first nonmove action each encounter costs 1 less AP, to a minimum of 1.

nodes.name: Redundant Core
nodes.description: The first lethal hit each encounter leaves it at 1 HP and grants Braced.

nodes.name: Command Bus
nodes.description: Once each round, spending at least 3 AP grants the other unit 1 AP.

nodes.name: Tuned Emitter
nodes.description: Arc Pin deals 1 more damage.

nodes.name: Range Lens
nodes.description: Energy attacks gain 1 range and 10 hit chance.

nodes.name: Forked Current
nodes.description: The first Arc Pin hit each turn deals 1 damage to the nearest enemy beside the target.

nodes.name: Capacitor Kick
nodes.description: Grants Overcharge, a 4 AP range 4 attack for 5 damage. Next turn begins with 1 less AP.

nodes.name: Ion Scar
nodes.description: Energy hits apply Conductive for 2 turns. Energy attacks gain 10 hit chance against Conductive targets.

nodes.name: Heat Sink
nodes.description: Overcharge no longer reduces AP on the next turn.

nodes.name: Arc Sweep
nodes.description: Grants a 5 AP range 2 cone attack that deals 3 damage to each target.

nodes.name: Palatine Circuit
nodes.description: The first energy hit each round chains 2 damage to two enemies within 2 tiles of the target.

nodes.name: Ram Plate
nodes.description: Grants Ram, a 2 AP melee strike for 3 damage that pushes 1 tile.

nodes.name: Armor Band
nodes.description: The attendant gains 4 maximum HP.

nodes.name: Guard Stance
nodes.description: Grants a 2 AP stance with Braced for 2 turns. Enemies within 3 tiles prefer the attendant for 1 round.

nodes.name: Intercept Arm
nodes.description: Once each round, it redirects the first attack against an adjacent agent.

nodes.name: Breach Teeth
nodes.description: Ram deals 2 more damage and applies Broken Guard for 2 turns.

nodes.name: Anchor Feet
nodes.description: It ignores forced movement, Snared, and Off Balance. An adjacent agent gains light cover.

nodes.name: Counter Ram
nodes.description: Once each round, an adjacent enemy that hits it takes 2 damage.

nodes.name: Last Wall
nodes.description: Once each encounter, a lethal attack against the agent within 3 tiles is redirected to the active attendant.

nodes.name: Dressing Arm
nodes.description: Grants a 3 AP range 1 treatment that restores 3 HP. Cooldown 2 turns.

nodes.name: Clean Line
nodes.description: Grants a 2 AP adjacent treatment that removes one cleansable negative condition.

nodes.name: Triage Optic
nodes.description: Healing restores 2 more HP when the target is at half health or lower.

nodes.name: Repair Foam
nodes.description: Grants a 3 AP self repair that restores 4 HP. Cooldown 2 turns.

nodes.name: Med Station
nodes.description: Deploys a station for 4 AP. It lasts 3 rounds and heals an adjacent ally for 1 HP at turn end.

nodes.name: Stimulant Needle
nodes.description: Once each encounter, spend 3 AP to give the agent 2 AP and Fatigued.

nodes.name: Emergency Clamp
nodes.description: Once each encounter, restore 3 HP after a hit leaves the agent alive at one quarter health or lower.

nodes.name: Mercy Rig
nodes.description: Med Station lasts 4 rounds, reaches 2 tiles, heals 2 HP, and clears one cleansable condition on its first pulse.

nodes.name: Hooded Lamp
nodes.description: The agent gains 5 Stealth while crouched with the attendant active.

nodes.name: Survey Glass
nodes.description: The agent gains 5 Search while the attendant is active.

nodes.name: Quiet Bearings
nodes.description: The crouched Stealth bonus rises by 10. Attendant movement creates no hearing suspicion.

nodes.name: Marking Beam
nodes.description: Grants a 2 AP range 6 action that applies Studied for 2 turns.

nodes.name: Ghost Light
nodes.description: Projects a lure within 5 tiles. In combat, nearby human enemies become Rattled.

nodes.name: Shadow Screen
nodes.description: Spend 3 AP to grant Faded to agent and attendant for 2 turns. Cooldown 3 turns.

nodes.name: Ambush Link
nodes.description: Once each encounter, a successful agent sneak opener triggers a free Arc Pin if range and sight permit.

nodes.name: Vanishing Circuit
nodes.description: Once each encounter, ordinary perception changes its first detection into an investigation. Forced and scripted detection still applies.

nodes.name: Sensor Stake
nodes.description: Deploys a stake for 3 AP. It lasts 3 rounds and grants allies 10 hit chance against enemies within 2 tiles.

nodes.name: Folding Screen
nodes.description: Deploys adjacent light cover for 3 AP. It lasts 3 rounds.

nodes.name: Snare Pod
nodes.description: Deploys a range 2 hazard for 3 AP. It deals 1 damage and applies Snared for 1 turn.

nodes.name: Arc Sentry
nodes.description: Deploys an adjacent sentry for 4 AP. For 3 rounds it attacks the nearest enemy within 4 tiles for 1 damage.

nodes.name: Double Rack
nodes.description: The attendant may sustain 2 deployables at once.

nodes.name: Relay Pylon
nodes.description: Deploys a pylon for 3 AP and 3 rounds. Agent and attendant gain 1 AP once per round when starting within 2 tiles.

nodes.name: Rapid Assembly
nodes.description: The first deployment each encounter costs 2 less AP. All deployables last 1 more round.

nodes.name: Field Workshop
nodes.description: Deployable limit becomes 3 and duration gains 2 rounds. Each field device receives its workshop improvement.
